matchingDescription: UK Cash ISA and investment platform, commission-free, FSCS protected savings

variants.text: Trading 212's Cash ISA pays high interest with flexible withdrawals and no account fees. Save completely free and earn interest tax-free. FSCS protected up to £85,000.
New to ISAs? Trading 212's Cash ISA has no minimum balance, no fees, and instant access to your money — a simple way to start saving tax-free.
Earning little to no interest on cash savings? Trading 212's Cash ISA offers a competitive rate with flexible withdrawals and zero account fees.
Trading 212's Cash ISA lets you withdraw and redeposit without losing your annual allowance — flexible, fee-free, FSCS protected saving.
Your savings are protected up to £85,000 with Trading 212's FSCS-covered Cash ISA — high interest, no fees, flexible withdrawals.
